hero.title: Boost your potential, connect your success with IRIS JE

services.title: Our Expertise at the Service of Your Ambitions
services.description: IRIS Junior Création supports entrepreneurs, startups, SMEs, and public institutions through innovative solutions.

about.title: Who Are We?
about.description_1: Founded in 2014 at the National School of Engineers of Sfax, IRIS Junior Création is a student association operating according to the consulting firm model.
about.description_2: Driven by the values of professionalism, innovation, and commitment, IRIS Junior Création strives to train tomorrow's engineers.

devis.title: Bring Your Project to Life
devis.description_1: Do you have an idea, a need, or a challenge to overcome? Our team is ready to help.
devis.description_2: Describe your project and receive a personalized quote.

contact.title: Let's Stay Connected
contact.description_1: Do you have a question, need more information, or wish to bring a project to life?
contact.description_2: Our team will be delighted to assist you.
contact.description_3: Let's build your next success together.

services.title: Customized services
services.description: Discover our IT, Marketing and Studies services to support your project.

it.title: IT Development & Digital Solutions
it.description: We create custom websites, mobile apps and chatbots to meet your technological needs.

etudes.title: Studies and strategic consulting
etudes.description: We carry out market studies, awareness studies, satisfaction surveys and business plans.

branding.title: Branding & Community Management
branding.description: Strengthen your brand image with our branding and community management services.

partenariat.title: Partnership & Sponsorship
partenariat.description: Support IRIS Junior Entreprise and benefit from unique visibility.

recrutement.title: Join IRIS Junior Entreprise
recrutement.description: Join our team of consultants and develop your technical and human skills.

hero.title: Our <accent>Services</accent>
hero.description: Discover our services in IT, Marketing and Studies. We put our expertise at the service of your projects.

introduction.title: Our Service Offer
introduction.description: IRIS Junior Entreprise operates as a consulting firm. We put our expertise at the service of entrepreneurs, SMEs and large accounts. Three areas of expertise to meet your needs.

it.title: IT
it.subtitle: Custom digital solutions to meet your technological needs.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Creation of custom websites or using content management systems. We use HTML/CSS/JavaScript for showcase sites and React JS and FastAPI frameworks for dynamic sites, as well as WordPress with its plugins for a turnkey solution.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.desc: Design of native mobile applications for Android with Dart and Android Studio, or hybrid cross-platform with the Flutter framework.

chatbot.title: Chatbot Creation
chatbot.desc: Design of intelligent chatbots with Dialogflow (Google). Integration on websites, mobile applications and social platforms like Facebook.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.subtitle: Strengthen your brand image and your presence on social networks.

branding.title: Branding
branding.desc: Creation of a complete graphic charter defining colors, typographies, logotype and layout rules. Design of custom logotypes for a strong and consistent visual identity on all your media (web and print).

community.title: Community Management
community.desc: Animation and engagement of your community on social networks. Content planning, visual creation, thematic monitoring and interaction with your subscribers to strengthen your visibility.

etudes.title: Studies
etudes.subtitle: Strategic studies to inform your decisions and optimize your development.

marche.title: Market Study
marche.desc: Collection and analysis of information to identify the characteristics of a market. Assessment of demand, analysis of competition, products, environment and trends. Use of PESTEL and SWOT methods.

notoriete.title: Awareness Study
notoriete.desc: Measurement of your brand awareness among consumers. Evaluation of spontaneous, assisted and overall perception of your company, its products and services.

satisfaction.title: Satisfaction Study
satisfaction.desc: Measurement of your customers' satisfaction level. Collection of feedback to improve your products, services and customer relationship. Identification of your strengths and areas for improvement.

business.title: Business Plan
business.desc: Development of a complete business plan for your creation or development project. Structuring of the economic model with the Business Model Canvas, financial forecasts and commercial strategy. Intended for investors and financial institutions.

cta.title: Do you have a project?
cta.description: Contact us to discuss your needs and get a personalized quote.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Discover IRIS Junior Entreprise, the Junior-Creation of ENIS. Our mission, vision, values.

hero.title: About IRIS JE
hero.description: Discover who we are, our mission and the values that drive us every day.

who_we_are.title: Who are we?
who_we_are.description_1: IRIS Junior Création is a student association founded in 2014 within the National School of Engineers of Sfax (ENIS). Operating according to the consulting firm model, it puts the skills of its members at the service of real projects through competitive and professional services.
who_we_are.description_2: As a non-profit organization, IRIS Junior Création has a dual vocation:
who_we_are.vocation_pedagogique_desc: Develop the technical, strategic and human skills of students.
who_we_are.vocation_economique_desc: Offer concrete and quality solutions to its clients and partners.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.quote: « Train students capable of evolving in a professional environment while offering high value-added services. »
mission.description: Through its projects, the association develops the skills of its consultants, promotes innovation, strengthens the spirit of initiative and supports its clients in their development.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description_1: IRIS Junior Création aims to become a national reference for professionalism, innovation and impact, by achieving the « Next Level » through structured governance, a clear strategy and a high-performance management system.
vision.description_2: Through a progressive and consistent evolution of the entity, based on its human values, its quality requirements and its collective commitment, IRIS Junior Création wishes to build a mature, reliable and recognized organization within the Junior-Enterprise movement.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We encourage new ideas, creative solutions and the ability to anticipate needs.

resourcefulness.title: Resourcefulness
resourcefulness.desc: We know how to make the most of available resources and turn every challenge into an opportunity.

inspiration.title: Inspiration
inspiration.desc: We want to motivate, transmit and create a positive impact around us.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.desc: We encourage new ideas, creative solutions and the ability to anticipate needs.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.desc: We value rigor, quality, reliability and respect for our commitments.

engagement.title: Commitment
engagement.desc: We move forward with involvement, responsibility and team spirit in every project.
